heading: Attending Physician to the Congress: grade
label: 715 Attending Physician to the Congress: grade
text: A general officer serving as Attending Physician to the Congress, while so serving, holds the grade of major general. A flag officer serving as Attending Physician to the Congress, while so serving, holds the grade of rear admiral (upper half).
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 715, , , related to detail of members of regular and reserve components to assist those components prior to repeal by , §§ 1662(g)(2), 1691, , , 3026, effective .
